reviews.comment:
Buena atención y productos pero deberían poner más despachantes en los surtidores para agilizar la carga de combustible

(Translated by Google)
Good service and products, but they should put more dispatchers at the pumps to speed up fuel loading.

reviews.comment:
Malísima atención. Los playeros y miran esperar y no acuden a despachar combustible.No recomiendo

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. The attendants just stand around waiting and don't come to pump fuel. I don't recommend it.

reviews.comment:
